name: Easy Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place 1 cup sugar in a food processor; blend for 30 seconds (or use fruit sugar).
3. Add the blended sugar to softened butter and cream mixture until very fluffy.
4. Combine flour and rice flour.
5. Beat the flour mixture into the batter in small portions.
6. Turn the batter out onto a lightly floured surface.
7. Knead the dough until smooth, adding up to 1/2 cup more all-purpose flour if needed.
8. Press the dough into a 15 x 9 inch jelly roll pan.
9. Score the bars with a sharp knife.
10. Prick the surface with a fork.
11. Sprinkle the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar over the top.
12. Bake for 10 minutes, then lower the heat to 300°F and bake until golden, about 30 to 40 minutes.
13. Cut along the scored lines, cool, and store in an air-tight container.
(Good recipe from Toronto Star, very fast.)
